textByHashes.b5b6c650fd6084e22206b6042025000831536706: Time to feel the strength of fire!
textByHashes.efc4178599a51a2e791d3fc8951bcc65f72eaab2: No more running, face me now!
textByHashes.64522cf5ac6a82d6a40638e10467358efc06a70a: Face the force of my fury!
textByHashes.69ef8d19c29b2ddbf2c4622bcac5f64b51eae83a: Let's see how you handle this!
textByHashes.f5a994176d43b3cdc0bfdbbcd7422a519bccf62c: Feel the heat of my wrath!
textByHashes.d1c9dc99a86fe5ee784af5c7e7b250e62934f16c: Time to show you my full strength!
textByHashes.d9308877a47cf5e620c46420b82975ecdb02cf4f: Finally I can unleash my true power!
textByHashes.0356e594bda4fdf4d3d4a9d2e5ca16c46c09e3a6: Feel the full strength of my wrath now!
textByHashes.d6c6068e945ee5ece85659543d1cf65ae3b5aaef: Now, there's nothing holding me back!
textByHashes.f804e7ace73c0b04c3be4afb8e6d598d2e23ef6f: No more holding back! Prepare to feel my full strength!
